items.name: Timberline HDZ
items.description: The #1 selling shingle in North America. Dimensional look with StrikeZone nailing area for faster, more accurate installation. 130 mph wind resistance, algae protection.

items.name: Landmark Series
items.description: Heavy-weight, dual-layer construction with a natural wood-shake appearance. Superior algae resistance and excellent colour retention for [Province]'s climate.

items.name: Duration Series
items.description: SureNail Technology provides superior wind resistance. Patented triple layer protection at the nailing zone. Available in 50+ colours.

items.name: Standing Seam Steel
items.description: Concealed fastener standing seam panels for a sleek, modern look. 40-year coating warranty, Class 4 hail resistance, suitable for [Province] snow loads.

items.name: HardiePlank Lap Siding
items.description: Fibre cement siding that's engineered for [Province]'s climate. Resists rot, fire, and insects. 15-year finish warranty. Available in 700+ colours.

items.name: Ultra Premium Vinyl
items.description: Thick-wall vinyl siding with insulated backing for improved R-value. Lifetime transferable warranty. Low maintenance, never needs painting.

items.name: HybriQ Quartz
items.description: Non-porous quartz surface that resists stains, scratches, and bacteria. Available in 90+ designs from classic white to dramatic dark stone. 25-year warranty.

items.name: Q Premium Quartz
items.description: Beautiful marble-look and solid colour options at exceptional value. Consistent colouring, non-porous, and extremely durable for busy kitchens.

items.name: Resilient Luxury Vinyl Plank
items.description: 100% waterproof LVP with a realistic wood look. Perfect for basements, kitchens, and bathrooms. Lifetime residential wear warranty.

items.name: Engineered Hardwood
items.description: Made in Canada, Mirage engineered hardwood offers the warmth of real wood with dimensional stability for [Province]'s climate swings. Available in 900+ options.
